ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the basketball team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL for the team logo */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays home games */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the metrics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season of the metrics */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played in the season */,
  "possessions" INTEGER /* Total number of possessions during games */,
  "frequency_pct" REAL /* Percentage of frequency for game plays */,
  "points_per_possession" REAL /* Points scored per possession */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "field_goal_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_pct" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_frequency_pct" REAL /* Free throw frequency percentage */,
  "turnover_frequency_pct" REAL /* Turnover frequency percentage */,
  "steal_frequency_pct" REAL /* Steal frequency percentage */,
  "and_one_frequency_pct" REAL /* And-one frequency percentage */,
  "score_frequency_pct" REAL /* Score frequency percentage */,
  "percentile" REAL /* Percentile ranking for team performance */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating (points scored per 100 possessions) */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating (points allowed per 100 possessions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization or role of the coach (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the coach */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team statistics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season of the statistics */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins during the season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total losses during the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage calculated as total wins divided by total games */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain, broken bone) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who received the award (null if coach) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach who received the award (null if player) */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Coach of the Year) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
